case_title: TARANTINO, LEONA vs. HULBERT, ROOSVELT et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT HULBERT, ROOSVELT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-20-1993 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PL. PRESENT W/DAVID LOW AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT W/REGINALD BEDELL AS COUNSEL. SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL.- RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 305 FRANKLIN ST, #5, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 12-6-93, 5PM - $2,000 RENT & DAMAGES - IF DEF. VACATES BY 12-6-93 PL. WILL FORGIVE RENT & DAMAGES, S/A JUDGMENT & DISMISS THE ACTION - IF DEF. DOESN'T VACATE WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY & DEF. WILL NOT BE ALLOWED ANY STAYS - DEF. SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE FORF. TO PL. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
